per_query.nl_prompt: How many films are in each rating category?

mode_a.sql: SELECT "film"."rating", COUNT(*) AS "film_count" FROM "film" GROUP BY "film"."rating"

mode_b.sql:
SELECT 
  rating,
  COUNT(*) as film_count
FROM film
GROUP BY rating
ORDER BY rating;

per_query.nl_prompt: Top 5 customers by total number of rentals

mode_a.sql: SELECT "rental"."customer_id", COUNT(DISTINCT "rental"."rental_id") AS "total_rentals" FROM "rental" LEFT OUTER JOIN "customer" ON "rental"."customer_id" = "customer"."customer_id" GROUP BY "rental"."customer_id" ORDER BY "total_rentals" DESC LIMIT 5

mode_b.sql:
SELECT 
  c.customer_id,
  c.first_name,
  c.last_name,
  COUNT(r.rental_id) as total_rentals
FROM customer c
JOIN rental r ON c.customer_id = r.customer_id
GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name
ORDER BY total_rentals DESC
LIMIT 5;

per_query.nl_prompt: Total revenue by film category, top 5

mode_a.sql: SELECT "sales_by_film_category"."category", SUM("sales_by_film_category"."total_sales") AS "total_revenue" FROM "sales_by_film_category" GROUP BY "sales_by_film_category"."category" ORDER BY "total_revenue" DESC LIMIT 5

mode_b.sql:
SELECT 
    c.name AS category,
    SUM(p.amount) AS total_revenue
FROM payment p
JOIN rental r ON p.rental_id = r.rental_id
JOIN inventory i ON r.inventory_id = i.inventory_id
JOIN film f ON i.film_id = f.film_id
JOIN film_category fc ON f.film_id = fc.film_id
JOIN category c ON fc.category_id = c.category_id
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 5;

per_query.nl_prompt: How many distinct films does each store have in inventory?

mode_a.sql: SELECT "inventory"."store_id", COUNT(DISTINCT "inventory"."film_id") AS "distinct_films" FROM "inventory" GROUP BY "inventory"."store_id"

mode_b.sql:
SELECT 
  store_id,
  COUNT(DISTINCT film_id) as distinct_films
FROM inventory
GROUP BY store_id
ORDER BY store_id;

per_query.nl_prompt: Which actors appear in the most films? Top 5

mode_a.sql: SELECT "actor"."actor_id", "actor"."first_name", "actor"."last_name", COUNT(DISTINCT "actor"."actor_id") AS "film_count" FROM "actor" LEFT OUTER JOIN "film_actor" ON "actor"."actor_id" = "film_actor"."actor_id" GROUP BY "actor"."actor_id", "actor"."first_name", "actor"."last_name" ORDER BY "film_count" DESC LIMIT 5

mode_b.sql:
SELECT 
  a.actor_id,
  a.first_name,
  a.last_name,
  COUNT(fa.film_id) AS film_count
FROM actor a
JOIN film_actor fa ON a.actor_id = fa.actor_id
GROUP BY a.actor_id, a.first_name, a.last_name
ORDER BY film_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

per_query.nl_prompt: Which countries have the most customers? Top 5

mode_a.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "customer"."customer_id") AS "customer_count" FROM "customer" LEFT OUTER JOIN "address" ON "customer"."address_id" = "address"."address_id" LEFT OUTER JOIN "city" ON "address"."city_id" = "city"."city_id" LEFT OUTER JOIN "country" ON "city"."country_id" = "country"."country_id" ORDER BY "customer_count" DESC LIMIT 5

mode_b.sql:
SELECT 
    c.country,
    COUNT(cu.customer_id) as customer_count
FROM country c
JOIN city ci ON c.country_id = ci.country_id
JOIN address a ON ci.city_id = a.city_id
JOIN customer cu ON a.address_id = cu.address_id
GROUP BY c.country
ORDER BY customer_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

per_query.nl_prompt: Average rental duration in days by film rating

mode_a.sql: SELECT "film"."rating", AVG("film"."rental_duration") AS "avg_rental_duration" FROM "film" GROUP BY "film"."rating"

mode_b.sql:
SELECT 
  f.rating,
  AVG(f.rental_duration) as average_rental_duration_days
FROM film f
GROUP BY f.rating
ORDER BY f.rating;

per_query.nl_prompt: What is the original language of each film?

mode_a.sql: SELECT * FROM "film" LEFT OUTER JOIN "language" ON "film"."language_id" = "language"."language_id"

mode_b.sql:
SELECT 
  f.film_id,
  f.title,
  l.name AS original_language
FROM film f
LEFT JOIN language l ON f.original_language_id = l.language_id
ORDER BY f.film_id;

per_query.nl_prompt: Show customer full names (first and last name combined)

mode_b.sql:
SELECT CONCAT(first_name, ' ', last_name) AS full_name
FROM customer;

per_query.nl_prompt: How many rentals have not been returned yet?

mode_a.sql: SELECT COUNT("rental"."rental_id") AS "unreturned_rentals" FROM "rental" WHERE "rental"."return_date" IS NULL

per_query.nl_prompt: What is the total revenue from all payments?

mode_b.sql:
SELECT SUM(amount) as total_revenue
FROM payment;

per_query.nl_prompt: List customers from the United States

mode_a.sql: SELECT "customer"."customer_id", "customer"."first_name", "customer"."first_name" FROM "customer" LEFT OUTER JOIN "address" ON "customer"."address_id" = "address"."address_id" LEFT OUTER JOIN "city" ON "address"."city_id" = "city"."city_id" LEFT OUTER JOIN "country" ON "city"."country_id" = "country"."country_id" WHERE "country"."country" = 'United States'

mode_b.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name, c.email
FROM customer c
JOIN address a ON c.address_id = a.address_id
JOIN city ci ON a.city_id = ci.city_id
JOIN country co ON ci.country_id = co.country_id
WHERE co.country = 'United States'
ORDER BY c.customer_id;
